headline: FULLY LEASED, MULTI-TENANT RETAIL BUILDING IN LAKE COUNTY, ILLINOIS, HITS MARKET WITH HILCO GLOBAL
summary: The Hilco Global real estate group is accepting offers until June 25 for a multi-tenant retail building in Third Lake, Ill. Currently leased at 100%, this 7,200± SF building provides opportunities for investors seeking stable, income-producing assets in the Northern Chicago suburbs.

headline: Humana: Perhaps The 'Buy The Dip' Thesis Was Right All Along (Rating Upgrade)
summary: Humana Inc. is upgraded to Buy as shares rebound from a >65% decline, supported by improved CMS rate decisions and activist investor involvement. Learn more about HUM stock here.

headline: Centric Brands and Claire's Announce Strategic Licensing Partnership
summary: NEW YORK, May 18, 2026--Centric Brands LLC, a leading global lifestyle brand collective, and Claire’s, a category-defining retailer for teens and tweens at the intersection of jewelry, fashion accessories, and piercing experiences, in partnership with Ames Watson, today announced an exclusive licensing agreement to expand the Claire’s brand into new categories and more than 7,000 additional retail touch points across North America. headline: CVS Health study reveals a need for greater digital health literacy for Medicare members
summary: CVS Health® (NYSE: CVS), today released "Navigating the Digital Health Literacy Gap," a research-based white paper revealing a significant gap between older Americans' current ability to navigate digital health tools and their interest and openness to learning more. These findings come at a crucial time as health care undergoes a profound transformation fueled by AI just as all baby boomers will be age 65 and older and are set to comprise one in five Americans by 2030*.

headline: Claire’s eyes expansion to 7K retail locations
summary: A licensing agreement with Centric Brands will scale the retailer’s presence across partners, including Walmart, Kohl’s and CVS and will push the brand into new categories.

headline: CNCF Welcomes CVS Health as a Platinum Member To Expand Cloud Native Collaboration
summary: The Cloud Native Computing Foundation® (CNCF®), which builds sustainable ecosystems for cloud native software, today announced that CVS Health will contribute its expertise in modernizing infrastructure to the cloud native community through its CNCF platinum membership.

(NYSE:CVS) is another stock that popped on Jim Cramer’s radar. The shares are up by 58.6% over the past year and by 19.7% year-to-date. […]
